prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为307→281→294→193→267名，整体波动较大。2024年位次异常前移至193名，2025年回弹至267名，近3年呈先降后升走势；2025年                        基准位次约267名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为18、19、19、19、20人，呈小幅增长；2026年计划大幅增至28人，较2025年扩招40%                         ，扩招幅度显著，预计将明显拉低录取位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第5（2026年），稳居全国顶尖高校                         行列，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理事件；但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，整体报考关注度仍                         处高位。历史投档异常方面，2022年河南理科投档线曾出现暴跌，但2025年声誉转为偏正面（科研成果重大荣誉），综合判断热度与关注度仍高；复旦大学拥有                        中国史、新闻传播学、数学、物理学、生物学、马克思主义理论等A+学科，以及临床医学、化学、应用经济学、计算机科学与技术等A学科，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类相关工科、计算机、人工智能等专业社会热度持续升温；本省2026年物理类考生数估算约35.6万人，较2025年36.3万人略有下降（约-2%），竞                         争压力略有缓解；省控线（本科批）从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争加剧；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，跨省报考热度高；该校在河                        北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%，非本地生源依赖型，地域偏好对报考影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次267名、2026年大幅扩招40%、省控线持                        续上升反映竞争加剧、抖音高热维持关注度等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约351名，区间301–401名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 307 → 281 → 294 → 193 → 267, showing overall significant fluctuation. In 2024, the ranking abnormally advanced to 193, rebounding to 267 in 2025, with a trend of first decreasing then increasing in recent 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 267. The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 18, 19, 19, 19, 20 students respectively, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 28 students, a 40% expansion compared to 2025, which is substantial and is expected to notably lower the admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, firmly among the top universities in China, with strong appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents; however, it ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, overall application attention remains high. In terms of historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan Science admission line experienced a sharp drop, but the 2025 reputation turned somewhat positive (major scientific research achievements), overall judgment indicates high heat and attention; Fudan University has A+ disciplines such as Chinese History, Journalism and Communication, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, and Marxist Theory, as well as A disciplines like Clinical Medicine, Chemistry, Applied Economics, and Computer Science and Technology, with top-tier disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Physics Category-related majors such as engineering, computer science, and artificial intelligence continues to heat up; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in this province for 2026 is about 356,000, a slight decrease from 363,000 in 2025 (approximately -2%), easing competition pressure slightly; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has continuously risen from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with high cross-province application heat; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0%, not heavily reliant on local students, with regional preference having a neutral to slightly positive impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 267, the significant 40% enrollment expansion in 2026, the continuous rise of the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, and sustained high attention on Douyin, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 351, with a range of 301–401.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Micro-Nano Electronics Innovation Academy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Leading Talent Class)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Digital Twin).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Innovation Academy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 301–401, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings better than 301, focus on impacting Xianghui Academy Shannon/Xianghui Plan and Computer Top Talent Class; for rankings around 351, prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class and Integrated Circuits Innovation Academy; for rankings near 401, consider Tier 3 majors like Future Information Innovation Academy as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 76 → 93 → 88 → 107 → 76, fluctuating within the range of 76–107. In 2024, the ranking shifted back to 107, and in 2025 it rebounded to 76; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 76.
2.                        [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 8 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 10 students, an expansion of about 42.9% compared to 2025, which is expected to notably lower the admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; in 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents; however, it ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, overall application attention remains high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2023 the ranking for Journalism and Communication majors declined, but in 2025 reputation turned somewhat positive (major scientific research achievements), overall judgment is that heat and attention remain high; Fudan University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category include Chinese History A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Law A-, Theoretical Economics A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors related to History Category (Law, Economics, Journalism and Communication, etc.) have diverging social popularity, with Law being relatively hot and Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; the estimated number of History Category candidates in this province in 2026 is about 254,000, an increase of about 4.3% from 244,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, with a clear rise in 2025; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with high cross-province application heat; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0%, not dependent on local students, and regional preference has a neutral to slightly positive impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 76, the significant 42.9% expansion in 2026, the approximately 4.3% increase in History Category candidates, and the rising provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 101, with a range of 51–151.
